baby-romaine-and-hot-smoked-salmon-salad.name: Baby Romaine And Hot Smoked Salmon Salad
instructions: Divide lettuce between plates or shallow bowls. Drizzle with dressing as desired; season with salt and pepper. Top each salad with 1 oz. salmon, 1/3 cup cabbage, 3 Tbsp. crunchies, and some red onion. Drizzle with a little more dressing.

baileys-recipe-comedera.name: Bailsys Recipe
instructions: In a blender, add a cup of milk.
It incorporates milk cream and condensed milk.
Add whiskey and Cocoa powder.
Add instant coffee, and it's time to process. It's good till all the ingredients are well mixed.
Incorporates into an airtight bottle and keeps cold.
Serve with plenty of ice and enjoy.

baileys-red-velvet-tres-leches-cake.name: Baileys Red Velvet Tres Leches Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C. Grease an 8x8x2-inch baking dish; line the bottom with a parchment paper square.

In a small bowl, whisk the flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt. In a medium bowl, using an electric mixer on high speed, beat the sugar and eggs until very light and fluffy, 5 to 7 minutes. Add half of the dry ingredients. Beat on low speed just to blend. Beat in the milk, then the remaining dry ingredients, just until blended. Transfer to the cake pan; smooth the top.
Bake until the top springs back when pressed and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 25 to 30 minutes. Let cool in the pan on a wire rack for 15 minutes.

In a medium bowl, whisk 1 1/4 cups Baileys, 1 cup cream, evaporated milk, and vanilla. Using a skewer, poke lots of holes all over the cake, all the way to the bottom. Pour half of the Baileys mixture over the cake and let stand for 10 minutes. Pour the remaining Baileys mixture over and let cool completely. Cover and refrigerate for at least 8 hours and up to 2 days.
Run a knife around the edge of the pan. Place a plate on top of the pan; carefully invert the cake onto the plate; remove the parchment paper.

In a medium bowl, beat the cream cheese and sugar until smooth. Beat in the remaining 1/4 cup Baileys Red Velvet. Beat in the remaining 1 cup cream until firm peaks form. Spoon on top of the cake. Top with strawberries.

baked-cherry-pancakes-lezzet.name: Baked Cherry Pancakes

ingredients.item: 500 g vişne (free and preferred to you)

instructions: 1. Coil the base and edges of a non-solar round oven container.
2. Up to 1-2 tablespoons of powder sugar sprinkle.
3. indexes vişne grains in order to completely cover the base and be one row.

baked-chicken-thighs-with-potatoes-comed.name: Baked Chicken Thighs With Potatoes
baked-chicken-thighs-with-potatoes-comed.original_name: Muslos de pollo al horno con patatas
instructions: He's pounding his potatoes and his cuts aren't that bad. It also pics onion and pepper in julians.

In a plastic bowl or whatever you have at hand, put the chicken with the spices, salt, pepper and an olive oil jet and make sure that everything's well distributed. Reserve while pressurizing the oven at 180 degrees.

En una bandeja para hornear pon primero las patatas con la cebolla y pimiento, como si fueran una cama y encima coloca los 2 muslos de pollo. Puedes poner una pizca extra de los condimentos a la verdura.
Baked for about 40-45 minutes, the cooking time can vary slightly depending on the size of the pieces and the quality of your oven. Check regularly to avoid a surprise.
About half of cooking turns the pieces of chicken to be golden with both sides.
Once after 40-45 minutes and after checking that everything was effectively well cooked, remove the plate from the oven and serve.

baked-corn-on-the-cob-with-butter-pequer.name: Baked Corn On The Cob With Butter
baked-corn-on-the-cob-with-butter-pequer.original_name: Mazorcas de maíz al horno con mantequilla

ingredients.item: 100 g de mantequilla a temperatura ambiente

instructions: We purify the oven at 200 been 3 been. Meanwhile, we clear up the seawatballs and remove the leaves and threads that cover them. If the corn is very fresh, the threads can easily come out by rinsing them under water.

In a bowl we mix butter with salt, black pepper and powder garlic if we decide to use them. We can also add the lemon juice to give them a fresh and acid touch. The idea is to have a well integrated mix that we can put onto the mazorcas.
With a kitchen brush or with our hands, we generously anoint every mazorca with butter mixture. Be sure to cover every side well so that they look good.

We put the mazorcas onto an oven plate covered with paper of aluminium. You can also wrap each mazorca separately into aluminum paper if you prefer a more tender and juicy texture. We bake the minks for about 30 to 35 minutes, and turn them around half as soon as we can to make sure they are cooked evenly. If you're looking for a more golden and crisp finish, you can leave them uncovered for the last 10 minutes.
Una vez listas, las sacamos del horno y las espolvoreamos con un poco de queso parmesano rallado y perejil fresco picado para darles un toque de color y frescura.

baked-hake-recipe-comedera.name: Baked Hake Recipe

ingredients.item: 1  kilo de lomos o filetes de merluza

instructions: Para comenzar esta receta, vamos a precalentar el horno, a 180 grados.

Then we'll need the fish to be clear (with no scales and no guts). Once this point has been covered, we will have care of the plants. We'll start by peeling the onion and cutting it into ribbons or julian.
En el caso del pimiento, lo lavaremos muy bien y lo abriremos para retirar las semillas y la vena (las partes blancas internas). Entonces cortaremos la pulpa en juliana.
Finally, we will peel our garlic teeth and mince them finely.

The following will be to prepare a frying with the vegetables we have been picking recently. To start with, we will warm a frying pan with an oil jet and once hot we will cook garlic and onion with medium-low heat.
After five minutes, constantly stirring, we will add the pepper and wine. We'll mix and let it come down for another five minutes.

Como hemos dicho anteriormente, el pescado debe estar limpio. Lo acomodaremos en un recipiente, placa (con bordeo bandeja apta para horno. Debe quedar con la piel hacia abajo. Luego, lo cubriremos con la cebolla, ajo y pimientos y llevaremos todo al horno precalentado, para que se cocine durante 10 minutos.
After this time, the hake will be ready to serve.

baked-rosemary-potatoes-lezzet.name: Baked Rosemary Potatoes
instructions: 1. Wash the potatoes thoroughly and chop the apple slice.
2. Add olive oil, salt, pepper and pepper leaves and mix well and transfer it to the oven container.
3. Cook over 200 degree oven 1 hour by covering oil paper and aluminum foil.
4. Cook over 15 minutes.
5. Serve hot.

baked-sea-bream-with-potatoes-and-pepper.name: Baked Sea Bream With Potatoes And Peppers (the Recipe)
baked-sea-bream-with-potatoes-and-pepper.original_name: Dorada al horno con patatas y pimientos (la MEJOR receta)
instructions: We peel the potatoes and cut them into thin cuts. We have them on the basis of an oven plate or fountain we have previously added some extra virgin olive oil.
On top we put the red pepper cut into strips and the onions, add some salt and an oil scattering. We get into the oven, preheated, at 180 ° C about 20 minutes.
En el mortero hacemos un majado de ajo, perejil y sal.
Disponemos una parte en el interior de la dorada.
Sacamos la fuente del horno con las patatas y verduras, con cuidado de no quemarnos
We have the golden and we distribute the rest of the sky above them. We water all with white wine and extra virgin olive oil and put another 20 minutes back into the oven.
We get out of the oven and we serve with steaks with a garrison of potatoes and onions and peppers.

baked-turkey-tenderloin-recipe-comedera.name: Baked Turkey Tenderloin Recipe
baked-turkey-tenderloin-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de solomillo de pavo al horno
instructions: Precalentamos el horno.
En un bol, mezclamos la pimienta, la sal, las hierbas provenzales y el aceite de oliva.
With this mixture we bathe and put them onto an oven-free fountain.
Ponemos el vino sobre los solomillos, tapamos con papel de aluminio y metemos la fuente en el horno.
We baked for about 25 or 30 minutes at 200-3.
We withdraw from the oven, trench into medallions and serve with anything you like.

bakery-style-pizza.name: Bakery-style Pizza
instructions: Make dough: Combine warm water and yeast in a small bowl. Let stand until yeast softens and forms a creamy foam, about 5 minutes. Combine flour and salt together in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with a dough hook attachment. Pour in yeast mixture. Knead dough until smooth, about 7 minutes.

Grease a large bowl lightly with olive oil. Form dough into a tight ball and place in the prepared bowl, turning to coat. Cover the bowl loosely with plastic wrap. Let rise until doubled in volume, about 30 minutes.
Meanwhile, make sauce: Mix crushed tomatoes and pizza sauce together in a medium bowl until well combined.
Grease a heavy-gauge rimmed 12x17-inch baking sheet generously with some olive oil.

Press dough into the prepared baking sheet. Prick dough all over with a fork. Arrange mozzarella cheese slices over dough; cover with 1 cup sauce. Sprinkle Pecorino Romano cheese on top. Drizzle remaining olive oil over pizza. Let rise in a warm area until puffy, about 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C).
Bake pizza on the center rack in the preheated oven until the edges are very dark brown, but the top is not burnt, 15 to 20 minutes. Cool in the pan for 5 minutes before slicing into squares.

barbeque-chicken-sloppy-joes.name: Barbeque Chicken Sloppy Joes
instructions: Combine barbecue sauce, orange juice, honey, orange zest, sherry, cayenne, and cloves in a large saucepan over medium-low heat. Stir until warm, 3 to 5 minutes. Add chicken; cook, stirring occasionally, until heated through, about 15 minutes. Serve on hamburger buns.

barley-vermicelli-pilaf-with-vegetables-.name: Barley Vermicelli Pilaf With Vegetables Recipe
barley-vermicelli-pilaf-with-vegetables-.original_name: Rice Recipe for Vegetable Arpa City

ingredients.item: 1 glass olive oil or liquid oil
3 cups hot water or vegetable suy  u

You can add butter corn or cu instead of peas; pumpkin.
If you don’t want to use mushrooms, you can add it in small parts of rice brocoli or carnflower.
You can add a different aroma of the battery, using green pepper or yellow pepper instead of red pepper.
You can use butter or butter–zeytiny mixture instead of olive oil.
Tomato salç instead of pepper you can change the color and flavor of the rice.

basic-high-altitude-bread.name: Basic High-altitude Bread
instructions: Combine water and yeast and let sit until foamy, about 10 minutes.

Combine flour, coconut oil, sugar, salt, and yeast mixture in a bowl. Knead until silky-smooth, about 15 minutes. Place dough in a large, lightly-oiled bowl and turn to coat. Cover with a towel and let rise in a warm place until doubled in volume, about 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a loaf pan.
Punch down dough and turn onto a lightly floured surface. Shape into a loaf and place into the prepared pan. Cover with a damp cloth and let rise until doubled in volume, about 30 minutes.
Uncover and bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes for an Italian-style loaf or 45 minutes for a sandwich-style bread.

batman-style-kutulk-lezzet.name: Batman Style Milk
instructions: 1. Batman is very hard to get bulguru wide rough, add hot water to the car and wait for the inflatable of bulgurine.
2. After bulgurlar is inflated, add mulberry, eggs, salt, pepper, pepper and pepper.
3. thoroughly knead the mixture.
4. You can add some flour if it does not stick to the dough.
5. Inner heat the liquid oil in a pan.
6. Add onion and roast until pink.
7. Add to the ground and shake the water of the meat and roast until it is possible.
8. Add and mix salt, pepper and pepper.
9. Add walnut and cook for 1-2 minutes.
10. Close the oven and let it cool.

bbq-cheeseburger-nachos.name: Bbq Cheeseburger Nachos
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175°C).

In a large pan or skillet, lay down half of the tortilla chips, followed by half of the ground beef, bbq sauce, cheddar, mozzarella, tomato, red onion, bacon, and parsley. Repeat with the remaining half of the ingredients, followed by a drizzle of BBQ sauce on top.
Bake for 15 minutes, until cheese is melted.
Enjoy!

bea-and-bills-bread-and-butter-pickles.name: Bea And Bill's Bread And Butter Pickles

ingredients.item: -quart canning jars with lids and rings

instructions: Combine cucumbers, onions, pickling salt, and garlic in a large pot. Place enough cracked ice atop the cucumber mixture to cover by at least 2 inches.
Cover the pot with a lid and refrigerate 3 to 12 hours. Drain all liquid from the mixture. Discard any remaining pieces of ice. Remove the garlic and set aside.

Bring the sugar, vinegar, mustard seed, turmeric, and celery seed to a boil in a separate large saucepan, stirring frequently. Add the cucumber and onion mixture; return to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and cook at a simmer until cucumbers and onion are soft, 5 to 10 minutes.

Sterilize the jars and lids in boiling water for at least 5 minutes. Pack the cucumber and onion mixture into the hot, sterilized jars, filling the jars to within 1/2 inch of the top. Run a knife or a thin spatula around the insides of the jars after they have been filled to remove any air bubbles. Wipe the rims of the jars with a moist paper towel to remove any food residue. Top with lids and screw on rings.
Place jars in a canning pot with at least an inch of water covering all of the jars and boil for 10 minutes.

Remove the jars from the stockpot and place onto a cloth-covered or wood surface, several inches apart, until cool. Once cool, press the top of each lid with a finger, ensuring that the seal is tight (lid does not move up or down at all). If you have a can that does not seal, just stick it in the fridge and eat that jar first. Store in a cool, dark area, and wait at least 3 hours before opening.

beef-barbacoa-barbacoa-de-res.name: Beef Barbacoa (barbacoa De Res)
instructions: Place brisket in a stovetop pressure cooker. Add onion, garlic, bay leaves, and salt; cover with water. Close cooker securely and place pressure regulator over vent according to manufacturer's instructions. Heat until steam escapes in a steady flow and makes a whistling sound, about 10 minutes. Adjust temperature until regulator is gently rocking. Cook for 60 minutes.
Let pressure release naturally according to manufacturer's instructions, 5 to 10 minutes. Unlock lid and remove.
Remove brisket from the pressure cooker and shred with 2 forks. Strain the cooking liquid, discarding solids. Measure 2 cups for the barbacoa sauce and save the rest for another use.

Combine guajillo chile peppers and ancho chile peppers in a saucepan. Cover with water, bring to a boil, and cook for 5 minutes. Remove from heat and let stand in the hot water until softened, about 5 minutes. Drain.
Combine softened chile peppers, vinegar, garlic, cloves, allspice, black pepper, oregano, thyme, cumin, ginger, cinnamon and reserved 2 cups cooking liquid; blend until thick and very smooth.

Pour sauce into a heavy-bottomed pot over medium heat and season with salt. Bring to a soft boil; reduce the heat to low. Stir in shredded beef, coating completely with sauce. Cover pot and cook until flavors combine, at least 30 minutes and up to 1 hour.

beetroot-cauliflower-pickle-recipe-lezze.name: Beetroot Cauliflower Pickle Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 medium size beet (wasted and ring chopped)
1 tablespoon of rock salt or pickled salt  u
1 cup vinegar (elma or Veuuml;züm vinegar is preferred)

instructions: 1. Wash and wash the sacs;&l;spare the beets into the ring.
2. sterilize jars and caps with hot water.
3. Place carnaut, beet, garlic, grain pepper and bay leaves in the jar.
4. Boil the salamura water you prepared by mixing salt, vinegar and sugar with water.
5. Carefully pour the jars to the jars, eat the vegetables u to completely close attention.
6. Close the mouth of the jars tightly and leave 3-4 g&uuml at room temperature.
7. Then relax the pickled in a cool and dark place 1-2 weeks.
8. Ready to serve the tour, get your mind.

bella-paloma.name: Bella Paloma
instructions: Slice a thin round from the grapefruit. Slice the round in half (into a half moon). Juice remaining grapefruit.
Pour kosher salt on a plate. Rub half of the rim of a highball glass with one of the slices. Dip rim of glass in salt. Fill glass with ice.
Add 1.5 ounces of Don Julio Reposado tequila.
Add 2 ounces of grapefruit juice and 1 ounce of Italian apéritif.
Juice the lime into the glass (should be 1 tablespoon juice) and add sugar.
Stir vigorously and strain tequila mixture into prepared glass.
Top off with seltzer. Garnish with the remaining grapefruit slice.

betty-browns-butter-cookies.name: Betty Brown's Butter Cookies
instructions: Beat butter, sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract together in a bowl using an electric mixer until smooth and creamy. Sift flour, cream of tartar, baking soda, and salt together in a separate bowl; mix, 1 cup at a time, into creamed butter mixture until dough is just mixed. Form dough into 1-inch-thick disks and place on a plate; chill in refrigerator, 2 hours to overnight.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Roll disks into desired thickness on a lightly floured work surface using a floured rolling pin. Arrange dough on a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until cookies are just starting to turn golden brown, 7 to 10 minutes.

bitter-chocolate-lavender-and-banana-tea.name: Bitter Chocolate, Lavender, And Banana Tea Loaf
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 5x9-inch loaf pan and line with parchment paper.

Beat banana, sugar, butter, and shortening together until smooth; mix in eggs. Stir fresh orange zest, dried orange peel, nutmeg, and vanilla extract into mixture. Gradually stir flour into moist ingredients. Fold chocolate and lavender into batter. Spoon batter into prepared loaf pan. Sprinkle coarse sugar crystals over batter.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of the loaf comes out clean, about 1 hour.

black-bass-with-preserved-lemonpistachio.name: Black Bass With Preserved Lemon–pistachio Sauce

ingredients.item: -oz. skin-on black bass or red snapper fillets

instructions: Season four 4-6-oz. skin-on black bass or red snapper fillets, patted dry, on both sides with kosher salt and freshly ground pepper. Heat 1 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Arrange fish, skin side down, in pan and cook, pressing down lightly on fillets with a spatula, until skin is browned and crisp and flesh is nearly opaque, 5–7 minutes. Turn fish and cook just until flesh is opaque throughout, about 1 minute. Transfer, skin side up, to a platter.

While the fish is cooking, cook 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter, cut into pieces, and 2 Tbsp. coarsely chopped raw pistachios in a medium skillet over medium-high, stirring occasionally, until nuts are golden and fragrant and butter solids are browned, 5–8 minutes. Add 4 garlic cloves, finely chopped, and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Remove from heat and add 3 Tbsp. finely chopped preserved lemon peel, 2 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice, and 1 Tbsp. water; stir vigorously and swirl pan to emulsify sauce. Season with kosher salt.
Pour sauce over fish; top with parsley leaves.

black-forest-cake-a-of-german-pastries-p.name: Black Forest Cake, A Of German Pastries
black-forest-cake-a-of-german-pastries-p.original_name: Tarta Selva Negra, un clásico de la repostería alemana

ingredients.item: 16 g of chemical yeast or billing powder
800 ml of liquid cream for mounting
8 cucharaditas de estabilizante de nata, p.ej este

instructions: To prepare this Black Forest cake, the first thing we're about to do is get the chocolate cake ready. To do this we have been best at beating butter with sugar. We put our balls together, one by one while we're still beating. We added the cocoa, the flour and the chewed yeast and mixed with a spatula.
We put this mixture into a padded mold and bake about 40 minutes at 180 ° C up and down, or till you stick with a stick and it's clear. We clear and cold onto a grid.

We ride the cream with the help of sugar and cream stabilizer and we reserve. We cut the biscuit into three parts. We damper every biscuit disc with cherries juice, extend a plate of baked cream and put the cherries and repeat the operation.
Cubrimos por completo con la nata montada. Decoramos con chocolate negro rallado y unas cerezas.

blackberry-crisp.name: Blackberry Crisp
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Combine oats, brown sugar, and 1/2 cup flour in a bowl. Cut in butter with 2 knives or pastry blender until the mixture is moistened and crumbly.
Spread blackberries into an 8-inch square baking dish. Sprinkle with remaining 1/4 cup flour and toss well to coat. Sprinkle oat mixture over top.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, 35 to 40 minutes.

blistered-edamame.name: Blistered Edamame

ingredients.item: Crushed red pepper flakes or gochugaru

instructions: Heat a large skillet, preferably cast-iron, over medium-high. Place oil in skillet followed by edamame, chiles, and garlic. Cook, tossing often, until edamame are blistered and garlic is golden, about 5 minutes. Toss in pepper flakes and sea salt. Serve with lime wedges.

blueberry-compote-with-coriander.name: Blueberry Compote With Coriander
instructions:
Bring 2 cups fresh or frozen blueberries, 3 Tbsp. sugar, 2 tsp. ground coriander, juice of ½ lemon, and a pinch of kosher salt to a boil in a small saucepan over medium heat. Cook, stirring occasionally, until some berries have burst and compote is syrupy, 7–10 minutes.
Do Ahead: Compote can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill.

blueberry-cornmeal-cake.name: Blueberry Cornmeal Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C. Spray 10-inch-diameter springform pan with 2 3/4-inch-high sides with nonstick spray. Whisk flour and next 3 ingredients in medium bowl. Whisk oil, eggs, vanilla, and honey in another medium bowl. Using electric mixer, beat butter, 3/4 cup plus 2 tablespoons sugar, and 1 1/2 teaspoons salt in large bowl until creamy. With mixer running on medium speed, gradually add egg mixture; beat to blend. Beat in flour mixture just to blend. Add ricotta and yogurt; beat on low speed just to blend. Pour half of batter into prepared pan. Scatter 1 1/2 cups blueberries over. Spoon remaining batter over in dollops, then spread to cover blueberries. Scatter remaining blueberries over. Sprinkle remaining 1 tablespoon sugar over.
Bake cake until top is golden brown and tester inserted into center comes out clean, about 1 hour 15 minutes. Cool completely in pan on rack.

blueberry-crumb-bars.name: Blueberry Crumb Bars

ingredients.item: Fresh blueberries (about 15 ounces) or one 12-ounce package frozen blueberries

instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C. Butter bottom of 13x9x2-inch metal baking pan. Whisk flour, oats, sugar, salt, and cinnamon in large bowl. Add 1 cup butter; rub in with fingertips until mixture sticks together in small clumps. Transfer 2 cups to medium bowl; mix in almonds and reserve for topping.
Press remaining crumb mixture evenly onto bottom of prepared pan. Bake crust until golden and just firm to touch, about 22 minutes. Cool 10 minutes.
Mix all ingredients in medium bowl. Spread evenly over crust in pan, then sprinkle reserved topping over.
Bake bars until filling bubbles thickly at edges and topping is golden brown, about 40 minutes; cool in pan on rack. Cut lengthwise into 4 strips, then cut each strip into 6 pieces, forming 24 bars.
These bars are best enjoyed on the day they're baked. If you'd like to get a head start on the recipe, the crust and crumb topping.
DO AHEAD: Can be made two days ahead. Cover separately and chill.

boilermaker-tailgate-chili.name: Boilermaker Tailgate Chili
instructions: Heat a large stock pot over medium-high heat. Crumble ground chuck and sausage into the hot pan. Cook, stirring frequently, until meat is evenly browned. Drain off excess grease.

Pour in chili beans, spicy chili beans, diced tomatoes, and tomato paste. Add celery, onion, bell peppers, chile peppers, bacon bits, bouillon, beer, 1/4 cup chili powder, garlic, Worcestershire sauce, oregano, cumin, hot pepper sauce, basil, cayenne, paprika, sugar, 1 teaspoon salt, and 1 teaspoon black pepper. Stir to blend, then cover and simmer over low heat for at least 2 hours, stirring occasionally.

Taste and season with more salt, pepper, and chili powder if necessary. The longer the chili simmers, the better it will taste. Remove from the heat and serve, or cool, refrigerate, and reheat the next day.
To serve, ladle hot chili into bowls and top with corn chips and Cheddar cheese. Enjoy!

borani-banjan-afghan-style-fried-eggplan.name: Borani Banjan (afghan-style Fried Eggplant In Yogurt)

ingredients.prep: cut crosswise into slices  0.25" (6 mm) thick
cut crosswise into slices  0.25" (6 mm) thick

instructions: Place 2 cups (480 g) full-fat yogurt, lightly whisked, in a flat serving dish and stir in 1 Tbsp. lemon juice. Set aside.

In a large skillet, heat ½ cup (120 ml) vegetable oil until it begins to shimmer. Add 1½ lb. (680 g) Italian eggplants or baby eggplants, cut crosswise into slices ¼" (6 mm) thick, making sure not to crowd the pan. Fry the eggplant for 1–2 minutes per side on medium heat until browned evenly, lowering the heat and adding more oil as needed. Transfer the fried eggplant to a plate lined with a paper towel to absorb excess oil.

In a clean large skillet, heat the remaining ¼ cup (60 ml) vegetable oil until it begins to shimmer. Lower the heat to medium-low and add 1 large yellow onion, halved, thinly sliced. Fry for 7–10 minutes until translucent. Add 1 tsp. minced garlic and fry for about 30 seconds, or until it no longer smells raw, taking care not to let it burn. Increase the heat to high and add 4 Roma tomatoes, cut crosswise into slices ¼" (6 mm) thick, 1 tsp. Kashmiri red chile powder, 1 tsp. salt, or to taste, ½ tsp. ground turmeric, and 1 bird’s eye chile, finely chopped. Cook for 5–7 minutes, stirring frequently, until the tomatoes soften. Lower the heat to medium and cover the saucepan with a lid. Let the sauce simmer for 5 minutes until the tomatoes have cooked down.

Carefully add the fried eggplant. Turn the heat to its lowest setting, re-cover the skillet, and let steam for 10 minutes. Carefully place the eggplant and tomato sauce on the yogurt. Garnish with additional chile powder and 1 tsp. dried mint and 1 Tbsp. pomegranate seeds (if using).

bordelaise-sauce-with-mushrooms.name: Bordelaise Sauce With Mushrooms
instructions: Melt 1 tablespoon of butter in a skillet over medium heat. Stir in the garlic and shallot, and cook until the shallot has softened and turned translucent, about 3 minutes. Add the remaining 3 tablespoons of butter, then stir in the mushrooms once the butter has melted. Cook and stir the mushrooms until they begin to soften, about 5 minutes.

Pour in the beef broth, wine, and Worcestershire sauce; season with the bay leaf and thyme, and bring to a simmer over medium-high heat. Once simmering, season to taste with salt and pepper, reduce the heat to medium-low, and continue to cook, uncovered until the sauce reduces slightly, about 30 minutes. Dissolve the cornstarch in the cold water, and stir into the simmering sauce until thickened. Remove the bay leaf before serving.

braga-frying-pans-teleculinaria.name: Braga Frying Pans

ingredients.item: 350 g de carne de porco picada
200 g de carne de novilho picada

instructions: Prepare the filling: in a frying pan, take half the lard to the heat, let it warm, add the minced meats, bacon and sausage and let it saute. Remove and reserve.
In the same frying pan, with the remaining lard, saute the onion and garlic, well chopped, along with the blond leaf. Add the meat and season with salt, pepper and some lemon juice.
Extend the leafy dough and cut it in circles, about 15 cm in diameter. In the center of half of the circles, have 1 spoon (soup) of the filling.
Cover with the remaining circles and close the ends tightly. Brush with the yolk beaten and take it to the oven, preheated at 210°C, until the pans are very golden.

bread-in-the-hull-argiro.name: Bread In The Hull

ingredients.item: 2 bottles of dry yeast or 2 cubes of 25 grams.
2 bottles of dry yeast or 2 cubes of 25 grams.

instructions: Ferment in a deep baking pan or a bowl with a wide base.
Place a folded towel on one side of the basin (the lower) so that there is a slight flop.
On the tilting side, rub the yeast with the ringers into pieces. Add sugar (or honey), anise and water (all on the side of the basin) to the yeast.
On the other side (the raised side), empty all the flower and salt. With the Fingers, we start making circular moves so that yeast and sugar dissolve in the water.
Slowly add a little bit of flour, continuing the circular moves until dough is formed.
Note Enjoy homemade, fluffy and crispy bread on the hall, easy to make: If you use dry yeast, mix with flour and add salt to the lukewarm (not hot) water.

Pour the olive oil into a deep fish. By punching hands into the oil, we bring the dough. Turn it over and continue the dough with the oily hands closed in a fist. When the dough absorbs all the oil, we take it out of the toilet and give it a strawberry shape.
Place the frange on a slightly oiled small pot and cover with the lid. Place the hall in the oven, on the last rack, on the resistors, at 503, and leave for 1 hour.

After the time has passed, turn the evening to 25°3 and continue baking for 50 more minutes. In the last 10 minutes you can remove the lid or transfer the bread to the evening grill, so that it turns brown and crisp everywhere.
When the bread turns red and puffed, remove it from the pot and leave it on a grill or clean towel, so that it remainscrisp until the last bit.

bread-stuffed-with-cod-teleculinaria.name: Bread Stuffed With Cod
instructions: Clean the climes and cook them in salted water. Pour them out and book them. It also cooks cod in water, drains it and reserves water. Cut off the bread and take away the nut, leaving the whole bread. Reserve.
Peel and pinch the onion and garlic teeth and saute them in a pot with the olive oil until they are golden. Add the cod and crelos and let cook, in mild heat, for about 5 minutes.

Then add half the breadcrumb, roughly cut. Gradually and always stirring, add the cod water, until the preparation becomes açorda consistency. Season with salt, pepper and chopped coriander. Fill the bread with this prepared and serve hot.

bread-with-chocolate-argiro.name: Bread With Chocolate
instructions: In bowls, add the flower, pieces of butter, Sweetener, beaten eggs and milk.
Mix with spoon.
Continue the kneading by hand.
When she sisters in a ball, we work a little on the work bench.
It must be soft and not adapted to the hands.
If it sticks, sprinkle with flour.
In a flowered bench, spread into a square sheet with dimensions 35×35 cm.
Brush with the Melted butter.
Sprinkle on the finely chopped apricots and chocolate drops.
Wrap it in a roll.
With a sharp knife cut into 12 slides, about 2 to 3 cm each. Butter good ring form 25 cm and spread parchment paper on the base.
We place the slides sideways, creating a bread breath.
Brush the milk.
Bake at 180
Add to a platter and pour with melted chocolate.

bread-without-yeast-argiro.name: Bread Without Yeast

ingredients.item: Oat flakes or flower for finishing
Oat flakes or flower for finishing

instructions: In a bowl, mix the flower, yeast and salt.
Add the water and simple combine the injectors with the hand or seed – we do not bring at all – until we have a dough with essential shape and quit liquid.
Transfer to oiled bowls, cover with membrane and leave it on the kitchen counter for 18-19 hours.
The texture of the dough after rest should be quiet supple, very soft and liquid, full of blisters, fibers and cords.
We remove it with flowered hands on a well flowered bench and press it glimpsely with the palm wintering.
We're not kneading her at all, we're just giving her a hand shape. We fold it to three by forming a long piece which we also fold to three. We pinch all the yeast components to stick.
Add a clean towel to a bowl and sprinkle the flakes of oats and whole flour.
We touch the bread with the union down on the cloth. Sprinkle the surface with oats and flour. Cover for about 30 minutes.
Preheat the evening to 230°C and place on the Bottom rack a tandem pot-glass, to cool well for 15 minutes. Heat the lead of the vessel.
Place non-stick paper on the hooll and carefulness, so that we don't burn, turn the bread over to the hot messel with the help of the towel, bringing the yeast ingredients upwards.
Cover with the hot lid and baking for 30 minutes. Uncover and continue baking for about 15-20 minutes, to inflate, brown well and make the crust crisis.
Turn the bread over on a towel to cool and dry. Allow it to cool for 20 minutes and then cut.

breaded-cheese-with-wild-fruit-compote-t.name: Breaded Cheese With Wild Fruit Compote
breaded-cheese-with-wild-fruit-compote-t.original_name: Queijo panado com compota de frutos silvestres
instructions: Season some panko with garlic duster, chopped parsley, salt and pepper and wrap it well.
Cut the cheese into slices 1 cm wide. Pass them by flour, the egg beaten and then the panko mixture. Have them on a tray and take them to the freezer for about an hour.
Fry the slices of camembert cheese in warm and abundant oil. Remove and drain the fat well. Serves with wild fruit jam.

breaded-hake-recipe-comedera.name: Breaded Hake, Recipe
instructions: To start with we have to run well with the medallions or hake loins. If necessary, do so carefully under a cold water jet and let them dry as long as necessary. You can help with paper absorbing, to remove excess fluid. The point is that they should be well dry at the time of cooking them, so that water does not interfere with the quality of frying and the formation of the cover of each piece of fish.

En un plato plano, dispondremos una capa de harina, que vamos a utilizar para rebozar los filetes. Dejaremos este plato listo y al lado, colocaremos un bol con el contenido de dos huevos. Vamos a revolverlos bien con la ayuda de un batidor manual.
Then we'll heat up an oil jet in a frying pan, at medium heat.
As the oil heats up, we're going to slightly get out every piece of hake, both sides. Then we'll have to get through the plate with flour, and through both sides.
Finally, we will sink every piece of fish into the beamed egg, making sure that it also covers them from both sides.

We'll get every piece of hake in the hot oil soon. We'll let them cook for one and we'll figure out how we'll get the cover we made with the egg and the flour. Then we will carefully turn every piece to be cooked across. Normally, cooking by side should take about 3 or 4 minutes.
When you see the cover of the golden and curved hakes, remove the fish from the cooking and serve immediately.

breaded-prawns-with-almonds-and-aioli-te.name: Breaded Prawns With Almonds And Aioli
breaded-prawns-with-almonds-and-aioli-te.original_name: Camarões panados com amêndoa e aioli

ingredients.item: Black pepper and salt in grain

instructions: Prepare the aioli: place the eggs, Dijon mustard, vinegar and garlic peeled in a tall glass and crush everything with the magic wand, while adding the oil, gradually, until the sauce gets the right thickness. Season with salt and pepper and reserve in the cold.
In a bowl, mix the water with flour, yeast, salt and sugar. Let this pollutant rest for about 30 minutes at room temperature.
Peel the shrimps, remove their head and guts and insert a stick on the side of their head towards the tail.

Pass the shrimps through flour, then through the polme and finally through the palm kernel. Fry in oil, moderately hot. Remove and drain on absorbent paper. Season with salt and pepper and serve with aioli, sprinkled with chopped coriander.

breaded-turkey-steaks-with-yogurt-sauce-.name: Breaded Turkey Steaks With Yogurt Sauce
breaded-turkey-steaks-with-yogurt-sauce-.original_name: Bifes de peru panados com molho de iogurte
instructions: Prepare the sauce: in a bowl, mix the Greek yogurt with parmesan cheese and finely chopped garlic. Also add some chopped parsley, salt and pepper and wrap it well. Reserve.

Prepare the mashed potatoes: peel and cut the sweet potatoes into thick slices, put them in a pot and cover with water. Season with salt and bring it to the fire until cooked. Drain, add the butter and crush with the magic wand until you get a mashed potatoes. Reserve.

Season the turkey steaks with salt and pepper. Place some flour, grated bread and eggs on separate dishes. Beat the eggs and season them with some salt. Mix some chopped parsley into the grated bread. Pass the steaks for flour, egg and grated bread.
Heat a frying pan with oil and fry the steaks on both sides until they are very golden. Serve them with the mashed potatoes and the yogurt sauce.

breakfast-apple-bran-loaf.name: Breakfast Apple Bran Loaf

ingredients.item: Oat bran or coarsely pulsed oats

instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C. Grease a 9x5 loaf pan or line it with parchment paper.

Into a large mixing bowl, combine the eggs and buttermilk and whisk well to combine. Add the grated apple, melted butter and vanilla and stir to mix. Add the bran cereal and let it sit for 5 minutes to absorb liquid.

While you're waiting, in another bowl, combine the dry ingredients. Combine the all purpose flour, oat bran, cane sugar, muscavado, pecans, baking soda, baking powder, sea salt, cinnamon and nutmeg. Stir to mix. Add the wet ingredients in with the dry and stir just to combine, do not overmix.

Pour the batter into the prepared pan, it should come up no more than 3/4 way up the pan. Sprinkle the top of the loaf with a handful of oat bran and brown or turbinado sugar. Bake on the middle rack for 40–45 minutes or until a toothpick in the center comes out clean. Allow it to cool completely before removing it from the pan.
Slice with a serrated knife and serve with butter on the side.
Loaf can be kept covered at room temperature for 3 days or for 5 days in the fridge.

breakfast-burrito.name: Breakfast Burrito

ingredients.item: . coarsely grated sharp yellow cheddar cheese

instructions: Whisk eggs and a large pinch of salt in a medium bowl until very smooth and a little frothy, about 30 seconds.

Melt butter in a 10" nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add eggs and cook undisturbed until almost completely set but still a little runny 2–3 minutes. The idea is to cook them into a flat, round shape about the same size as the tortilla.

Meanwhile, lightly toast tortilla over a medium-low flame, turning often with tongs, until warmed and lightly browned in some places, 5–10 seconds (or, toast in a large, dry skillet over medium-high heat until warmed and lightly browned in some places, about 1 minute per side). Transfer to a large piece of foil.
Turn eggs with a rubber spatula, then slide out of skillet onto tortilla.

Sprinkle cheese over eggs. Top with avocado and cilantro, leaving a 1" border around the edges. Add a few dashes of hot sauce and dollop sour cream over, if using. Fold sides of tortilla over filling, then roll up to enclose. Wrap burrito in foil and let sit so cheese can steam and melt, about 3 minutes. Slice in half, if desired.

breakfast-calzones.name: Breakfast Calzones
instructions: Prepare a grill for medium-low heat. Set cast-iron griddle on grill. (Alternatively, heat on stovetop over medium-low. And if you don’t have a cast-iron griddle, use a cast-iron skillet instead and cook in batches.) Cut each piece of dough into quarters for 8 pieces total. Roll out 1 piece of dough to an 8x6" oval. Spoon a heaping ¼ cup Fontina over half of dough and form a well in the center. Dab 2 Tbsp. ricotta and 1 Tbsp. nduja over Fontina, leaving well empty; slip a yolk into the well. Sprinkle with a bit of rosemary and drizzle with oil; season with salt. Moisten edges of dough with water, fold empty side of dough over filling and press together edges to seal. Brush with oil; sprinkle with salt. Repeat with remaining ingredients to make 7 more calzones.

Place calzones, oiled side down, on griddle and cook until deeply browned, pressing gently with a spatula to create contact with griddle, about 5 minutes. Brush oil on the other sides and sprinkle with salt; turn calzones over. Cook until other sides are deeply browned, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board and let sit 1 minute before cutting in half.

brewers-steaks-teleculinaria.name: Brewer's Steaks
instructions: Season the steaks with coarsely chopped garlic teeth, salt and pepper. Take a frying pan to the fire with the margarine, let it melt, add the steaks and let them fry from both sides to taste. Remove and reserve the steaks.

Add the mustard to the frying pan, add the broken vegetable broth and beer and bull until the alcohol evaporates. Dissolve the moreena flour in the milk, add the creams, stir, add to the frying pan and let it sticken, stirring always.
Add the steaks again, wrap them up and let them warm up. Serve with parsley and chopped pickles and olives and accompany with fries.

brie-in-the-oven-with-raspberries-and-wa.name: Brie In The Oven With Raspberries And Walnuts
brie-in-the-oven-with-raspberries-and-wa.original_name: Brie no forno com framboesas e nozes
instructions: Preheat the oven at 180 degrees. Take to the medium light a small pot with the nuts, melted butter and white sugar. Shake and let cook for 5 minutes, stirring always so that the sugar does not burn.
When the nuts are fully sugar-coated, transfer them to a sheet of vegetable paper and spread them so that they do not stick together. Let it cool down.
Place the cheese in a high refractory container and sprinkle it with yellow sugar. Take it in the oven for about 12 to 14 minutes. Remove and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Mix the honey and balsamic vinegar in a bowl and take it to the microwave for 1 minute. Remove, stir, add the raspberries and mix well. Let it rest for 2 to 3 minutes.
Espalhe as nozes caramelizadas sobre o queijo e depois acrescente as framboesas. Regue com o molho das framboesas e sirva.

brown-rice-and-beans-with-ginger-chile-s.name: Brown Rice And Beans With Ginger Chile Salsa

ingredients.item: Red jalapeños or fresno or holland chiles

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Add 1/4 of onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, about 5 minutes. Add rice and stir to coat. Add 2 cups water and season with salt. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to low, cover, and cook until rice is just tender, 40-50 minutes.
Remove from heat. Let stand, covered, for 10 minutes. Fluff rice with a fork. Fold in 1/4 cup cilantro; season with salt and pepper.
While rice is cooking, heat remaining 1 tablespoon oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Add 1/3 of remaining onion. Cook, stirring occasionally, until onion has softened, about 5 minutes.
Add coriander and cumin; stir 1 minute. Add beans and broth; season with salt and pepper. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, occasionally mashing beans, until thickened, 8-10 minutes.
Pulse chiles, garlic, ginger, lime zest, lime juice, and remaining onion in a blender until a chunky sauce forms. Season salsa with salt.
Serve rice with beans; top with salsa, avocado, cheese, 1/4 cup cilantro, and lime wedges.

build-your-own-pie-thanksgiving-dessert-.name: Build-your-own-pie Thanksgiving Dessert Bar

ingredients.item: Batches our favorite pie dough or gluten-free multi-purpose sweet pastry dough
Batch stovetop butterscotch apples and cranberries

instructions: Arrange racks in top and center of oven; preheat to 191°C. Line 2 rimmed baking sheets with parchment paper. Working in batches, roll dough between 2 pieces of parchment until 1/8" thick. Chill while rolling remaining dough.

Using a 4 1/2" round circle cutter, bowl, or large glass and keeping remaining dough chilled while you work, cut out circles of dough and transfer to prepared baking sheets. Chill 10 minutes. Reroll scraps one time and continue to cut and chill until you have 25 circles.
Whisk egg and milk in a small bowl. Brush circles with egg wash and sprinkle with sugar. Bake circles, rotating sheets halfway through, until golden brown, 12–14 minutes.
Transfer pie circles to a platter. Serve with toppings of your choice.

buko-young-coconut-pie.name: Buko (young Coconut) Pie

ingredients.prep: drained with meat removed and chopped

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Place chopped coconut into a large bowl; stir in evaporated milk, condensed milk, beaten eggs, sugar, and salt. Pour mixture into a round 3-quart baking dish. Place the baking dish into a large roasting pan. Fill the pan with water to about halfway up the sides of the baking dish.
Carefully place the pan into the preheated oven; bake until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 60 minutes. Let cool for at least 30 minutes before serving.

buttered-green-beans.name: Buttered Green Beans
instructions: In a large kettle, cook 3 pounds green beans in 6 quarts boiling salted water over moderately high heat for 8 minutes, or until they are tender. Drain the beans in a colander and refresh them under running cold water until they are cool. Trim the beans and cut them into the desired length or leave them whole.

In a large skillet, heat the beans with 2 tablespoons minced parsley in 1 stick or ½ cup salted butter over moderate heat, shaking the pan to coat them with the butter. Season the beans with salt and pepper to taste, transfer them to a heated vegetable dish, and top them with 2 tablespoons butter, cut into bits.

butterfly-pasta-with-yellow-pepper-sauce.name: Butterfly Pasta With Yellow Pepper Sauce

ingredients.item: Half tea cup less oily soft goat cheese Home
Half water cup less oily white cheese

instructions: 1. Take all the necessary ingredients for pasta dough into a large mixing container.
2. knead until you get a smooth consistency dough.
3. Wrap the dough on the stretch film and rest for 2 hours.
4. Split the peppers for the sauce and mole the beans in the oven or in the grill.
5. Take aside to cool down the shells.
6. Get cold peppers in a large bowl.
7. Add cheeses and get a smooth consistency from the blender.
8. Taste salt and pepper and heat in a sauce pot.
9. Take the chopped dough on the countertop.
10. Open thin with the help of a roller.
11. 11. Cut small rectangles with the help of cut a chopped dough from dough.
12. Give the butterfly shape by shrinking from the middle of the rectangle parts you cut.
12. August Roast pasta in salt boiling water.
14 July Mix well by pouring the sauce you bite.
15. Decorate roasted almond with hot service.

buttermilk-barbecue-chicken.name: Buttermilk Barbecue Chicken
instructions: Whisk buttermilk, brown sugar, cider vinegar, garlic, thyme, pepper, paprika, cumin, cayenne, and salt together in a bowl.

Trim wing flats from the chicken. Cut along both sides of the backbone from the tail to the neck; remove backbone. Make a 1/4-inch-deep cut through the piece of cartilage in the center. Open up both sides to reveal breastbone; lift out. Cut chicken in half through the center line.
Place both halves in a resealable zip-top bag and pour in the buttermilk marinade. Place the bag in a bowl to catch any leaks. Press air out and seal. Marinate in the fridge for 6 to 18 hours.
Preheat an outdoor grill for medium heat and lightly oil the grate. Remove chicken from marinade and transfer onto a paper towel-lined plate. Blot off excess marinade.
Place chicken on the grill cut-side down, skin-side up; cover and cook for 20 minutes.

Flip chicken over and continue grilling for 7 to 10 minutes. Flip once more and grill until no longer pink in the center, about 15 minutes more. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh, near the bone, should read 74°C (74 degrees C).

buttermilk-beignets.name: Buttermilk Beignets

ingredients.item: Bread flour plus extra for flouring work surface

ingredients.prep: as much as you think you'll need—then double that!

instructions: Heat the milk in a small saucepan over medium-high heat until small bubbles form at the surface. Remove from the heat, add the buttermilk, and then pour into a stand mixer bowl. Whisk in the yeast and the sugar and set aside for 5 minutes. Add the flour, baking soda, and salt, and mix on low speed, using a dough hook, until the dry ingredients are moistened, 3 to 4 minutes. Increase the mixer speed to medium and continue mixing until the dough forms a loose ball and is still quite wet and tacky, 1 to 2 minutes longer. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and set the dough aside in a draft-free spot for 1 hour.

Pour enough peanut oil into a large pot to fill it to a depth of 3 inches and bring to a temperature of 191°C over medium heat (this will take about 20 minutes). Line a plate with paper towels and set aside.

Lightly flour your work surface and turn the dough out on it. Sprinkle the top of the dough with flour, gently press to flatten, fold it in half, and gently tuck the ends under to create a rough-shaped round. Dust again and roll the dough out into a ½-inch- to ¹/³ -inch-thick circle. Let the dough rest for 1 minute before using a chef's knife, a bench knife, or a pizza wheel to cut the dough into 1 1/2-inch squares (you should get about 48).

Gently stretch a beignet lengthwise and carefully drop it into the oil. Add a few beignets (don't overcrowd them, otherwise the oil will cool down and the beignets will soak up oil and be greasy) and fry until puffed and golden brown, turning them often with a slotted spoon, for 2 to 3 minutes. Transfer to the prepared plate to drain while you cook the rest. Serve while still warm, buried under a mound of confectioners' sugar, with hot coffee on the side.

The beignet dough can be made up to 8 hours in advance of frying. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and spray it with nonstick cooking spray. After cutting the dough, place the beignets on the paper and place another greased sheet of parchment paper, sprayed-side down, on top. Wrap the entire baking sheet with plastic wrap and refrigerate. The beignets can be fried straight from the refrigerator.
